name: pin-install-script-tag
description: Pin a curl-piped install script to a specific version tag for reproducible Docker builds. Use when: (1) a Dockerfile uses curl | bash install.sh without a --tag or version flag, (2) a previously-pinned cargo/apt install was replaced with a pre-built binary installer but the version pin was dropped, (3) you need to prevent silent upgrades of binary tools installed via official installers.
